name: PDF.js
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器内把 PDF 二进制稳定解析并渲成可缩放 canvas 页面时用它而非手写,因为原生在交叉引用表、字体、压缩流和页面几何上失败;非做 PDF 编辑、批注工作流或表单提交。
why_valuable: AI 默认无法解析 PDF 二进制,更做不到字形定位、页面 viewport、增量加载与 worker 解码;PDF.js 把输入收敛为 URL/字节并给出可复算的页面画布。

data_in.note: 主输入虽是 PDF URL/字节,组件产物按 PDF page viewport 的 geometry 渲染;本条只覆盖单页 canvas,不承诺 viewer 全套 text/annotation layer。

schema.source: string(URL) | Uint8Array | ArrayBuffer | null —— null 是空态,显示占位而不调用 getDocument
schema.page?: integer >= 1 —— 默认 1,且不得超过 pdf.numPages

spec.note: canvas 外层必须显式像素高度并允许滚动(铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高);默认 600px。canvas 自身像素高由 page.getViewport 与 devicePixelRatio 决定,不要用 CSS 强行拉伸页面。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):用 jsDelivr /npm/pdfjs-dist@6/+esm,显式设置 pinned workerSrc,再以 getDocument → getPage → page.render 原生链渲染。

carriers.widget: conditional:canvas 可落 shadow,但宿主 CSP 必须允许从 jsDelivr 启动 module worker;worker 探针未通过时不可降格宣称 supported
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox iframe 须允许跨源 module worker;无 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: Render output is a <canvas> appended to the given (shadow) container; PDF decoding runs in a Web Worker (build/pdf.worker.min.mjs, thread-based postMessage, not DOM). The single-page getDocument+render path writes nothing to document.head/body and registers no persistent window/document listeners (TextLayer/AnnotationLayer — which would — are out of scope for this canvas-only entry). Only host caveat is CSP allowing a jsDelivr module worker, not a shadow-DOM issue.

en.when_to_use: Use it to parse PDF binary reliably in the browser and render scalable canvas pages instead of implementing it by hand, which fails at cross-reference tables, fonts, compressed streams, and page geometry. Not for PDF editing, annotation workflows, or form submission.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot parse PDF binary by default, much less position glyphs, calculate page viewports, incrementally load data, and decode in a worker; PDF.js reduces input to a URL/bytes and produces reproducible page canvases.

data_in.note: Although the primary input is a PDF URL/bytes, the component renders by the geometry of the PDF page viewport. This entry covers a single-page canvas only and does not promise the viewer's complete text/annotation layers.

schema.source: string(URL) | Uint8Array | ArrayBuffer | null -- null is an empty state that displays a placeholder without calling getDocument
schema.page?: integer >= 1 -- Default 1; must not exceed pdf.numPages

spec.note: The canvas wrapper needs an explicit pixel height with scrolling; vh and percentage heights are forbidden by rule 3. Default is 600px. Canvas pixel height comes from page.getViewport and devicePixelRatio; do not stretch the page with CSS.
